title: ocotea olivacea
intro: Ocotea olivacea, also known as the Olive Tree or Brazilian Prune, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae. The Ocotea olivacea plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ocotea olivacea include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Ocotea olivacea include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
